---
name: ux-cpa-orchestrator
description: Skill master of Cognitive Product Architecture (CPA). Use for orquestrar analise completa of UX envolvendo cognicao, comportamento, UI, strategy, etica e sustentabilidade. Base operacional: # Playbook  ## Objective Coordinate complete UX analysis integrating all specialized skills in the package.  ## Quality Bar Use quando o pedido envolver: ux audit, ux analysis, ux orchestrator, cognitive product architecture, cpa, full ux review.
---

# UX CPA Orchestrator

## Stack alvo
- Next.js 15+ App Router
- React 19+
- TanStack Query
- shadcn/ui + Tailwind v4
- Monorepo (apps + packages)

## Workflow
1. Diagnostico cognitivo with ux-cognitive-architecture.
2. Mapeamento of loop comportamental with ux-behavioral-loop.
3. Correcao of sistema visual with ux-visual-systems.
4. Plano of experimento with ux-lean-experimentation.
5. Gate etico with ux-ethics-bias and gate of sustentabilidade with ux-sustainable-product.
6. Narrativa for stakeholders with ux-emotional-stakeholder.

## Saída esperada
1. Problema sintetizado.
2. Diagnostico by camada (cognitiva, visual, comportamental).
3. Plano of mudanca priorizado (P0/P1/P2).
4. Hypotheses and metrics of validation.
5. Riscos eticos and mitigactions.
6. Script of comunicacao for stakeholders.
